hero.title2: But your operation may already be degrading.
hero.description: Ohrly transforms operational behavior into shared context so engineering, product and business teams can act before silent degradation becomes visible impact.
hero.feature1Description: Find degradation days before it becomes obvious.
hero.feature2Description: Engineering, product and business in one view.
hero.feature3Description: Decisions with context, not just metrics.

cards.title: APM is green
cards.description: Infrastructure looks healthy, but users are struggling.

cards.title: No incident declared
cards.description: Operational effort is rising before anyone notices.

cards.title: Impact appears late
cards.description: By the time metrics move, the damage is already happening.

hiddenCost.title1: The real cost is not the incident.
hiddenCost.title2: It is the time spent degrading before anyone acts.

cards.title: Delayed decisions
cards.description: Teams wait for stronger evidence while degradation accumulates and recovery becomes harder.

cards.title: Operational ambiguity
cards.description: Engineering, product and business see different symptoms of the same problem.

cards.title: Invisible erosion
cards.description: Conversion, retention and operational efficiency degrade before alerts or KPIs become critical.

steps.title: Reconstruct behavior
steps.description: We read events, steps and trajectories across your critical flows.

steps.title: Detect behavioral drift
steps.description: We identify when current behavior diverges from historical healthy patterns.

steps.title: Translate into context
steps.description: We show what changed, where it started and what may happen if it persists.

language.title: One operational language for engineering, product and business.

comparison.title: Ohrly is not another monitoring tool. It is a new layer of operational intelligence.

rows.ohrly: Shared by engineering, product and business

cta.description: Know when your flows stopped behaving as expected before customers and business metrics make it obvious.
